title: 3D Mind Mapping in WorkCanvas (or even 2D to 2D)
excerpt: Would love to have a 3D type mind mapping feature. Use case is mapping revenue streams. In 2D it becomes hard to squeeze anything in very quickly. If I could click on a a bubble and it would go into another mind map, tha…

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to have a 3D type mind mapping feature. Use case is mapping revenue streams. In 2D it becomes hard to squeeze anything in very quickly. If I could click on a a bubble and it would go into another mind map, that would be cool and sufficient (2D to 2D).

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Heard today in the webinar from Monday.com they are exploring this area! So perhaps watch this space!!
